response.overview: With the narrative of UAP’s being a threat to our national security in the present, Clive brings on one of the original Phoenix Lights Witnesses Tom King to discuss the realistic possibilities of what a Threat from an advance civilization would like like. Would they come from space, or does this possible threat come from some much closer to home
response.tagline: With the narrative of UAP’s being a threat to our national security in the present, Clive brings on one of the original Phoenix Lights Witnesses Tom King to discuss the realistic possibilities of what a Threat from an advance civilization would like like.
response.title: Aliens Uncovered: Invasion 2
